title: SQLite schema and migrations
description: Implement the 6-table schema using sqlx migrations: personas, followers, posts, post_media, delivery_queue (with idx_delivery_pending index), feed_state. Use TEXT PRIMARY KEY with snowflake IDs. All timestamps as ISO 8601 TEXT with SQLite strftime defaults. WAL mode enabled on connection.
close_reason: Schema in db.rs, ID gen in id.rs, config parsing with validation in config.rs
